## 📸 Screenshots / Demos (if applicable)

<!-- Drag & drop images here to show UI changes or output. -->

## ✅ Checklist

### Code Quality

- [ ] Code follows the project's style conventions (PEP 8, Black, isort)
- [ ] No unnecessary imports, dead code, or commented-out blocks
- [ ] Functions and classes have docstrings
- [ ] No new linting warnings or errors
- [ ] Changes are backward-compatible (or breaking changes are clearly documented)

### Documentation

- [ ] Relevant documentation in `docs/` has been updated
- [ ] Any new CLI flags, config options, or API changes are documented
- [ ] README updated if needed
- [ ] CHANGELOG entry added (if the project maintains one)

### Review

- [ ] PR is focused on a single change (no unrelated drive-by fixes)
- [ ] Commit messages are clear and descriptive
- [ ] PR is ready for review (not a draft unless explicitly marked)
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code

### Licensing

- [ ] I agree that my contribution is licensed under the project's [MIT License](LICENSE)
- [ ] All new files include the appropriate license header

---

<!--
  Anything else the reviewer should know?
  Decisions you made, trade-offs, future work, etc.

> 🙏 **Thank you!** A maintainer will review your PR as soon as possible.
> In the meantime, check that CI is green and all checks pass.
